equipmentMods.trinket: Toxicity: On spawn 25% chance to fire a toxic projectile that will spawn another toxicity pool. (This mod stacks up to 2 times)

equipmentMods.horn: Starblades: For each extra blade, all blades deal 15% additional damage.

equipmentMods.goblet: Eye of the Storm: The cloud will spawn an additional clouds, dealing 25% damage of the eye of the storm iteself.
equipmentMods.horn: Electric Dragons: Each dragon has a 30% chance to shoot a burst of electric meteors that deal 15% damage.
equipmentMods.trinket: Chain Lightning: When a link connects, it also strikes the target with a lightning bolt from the sky that deals the 35% of Chain Lightning damage.

equipmentMods.goblet: Death Blade: Summon a smaller Death Blade that circles around the primary Death Blade and deals 30% damage. Each time a small death blade spawns, it adds 15% damage to Arcane spike.
equipmentMods.horn: Death Blade: When Death Blade despawns, it will summon an arcane spike on a nearby enemy, dealing 10% damage + 20% additional damage for every second the blade was on the field.

equipmentMods.goblet: Dragon Flame: Increase radius of fire breath area by 40%, and 10% chance to deal an additional 40% damage.
Chain Lightning: Chain lightning will link two additional times.
equipmentMods.horn: Vortex: Each vortex spawn 2 small vortexes that deals 10% of the Vortex damage.
equipmentMods.trinket: Vortex: When vortexes collide, they turn into a thunderstorm, that deals an additional 15%.

equipmentMods.goblet: Static Charge: Gain charges by damaging foes. Each charge adds 1% lightning damage. At 100 charges, summon thunderbolts across the battlefield.
equipmentMods.horn: Static Charge: Static charge will strike an additional time, damaging more enemies and dealing an addition 1% per enemy inside Static Charge range.
equipmentMods.trinket: Static Charge: Static charge will strike an additional time, damaging more enemies and dealing an addition 1% per enemy inside Static Charge range.

equipmentMods.goblet: Lightning Plasma: Fires an additional Lightning Plasmas, and deals an additional 5% based on Lighting Plasma range.
equipmentMods.horn: Lightning Plasma: Lightning Plasma now grows 20% longer in range, attacks 13.33% faster, and hits 1 additional time. (this mod can be stacked up to 3 times)
equipmentMods.trinket: Lightning Plasma: Fires an additional Lightning Plasmas, and deals an additional 5% based on Lighting Plasma range.

equipmentMods.goblet: Lightning Totems: Totems will now summon an additional Lightning bolt.
equipmentMods.horn: Lightning Totems: Totems will now summon an additional Lightning bolt.
equipmentMods.trinket: Lightning Totems: Totems range grows by 40%. Totems deal an additional 5% damage for every consecutive Lightning Bolt.

equipmentMods.goblet: Fire Orbs: Each orb launches two mini-orbs at your targets, dealing 15% damage.
equipmentMods.horn: Arcane Apocalypse: Increase explosion size by 30%. When an explosion hits, 10% chance to gain 2% Arcane damage buff, stacks up to 75.

equipmentMods.goblet: Arcane Orb: Orbs become Chaos orbs, dealing 10% increased damage. Chaos orbs have a 10% chance to cause an Arcane burst when returning to the player.
Arcane Orbs: Fire an additional orb.
equipmentMods.horn: Arcane Orbs: Fire an additional orb.
equipmentMods.trinket: Arcane Orb: Orbs become Chaos orbs, dealing 10% increased damage. Chaos orbs have a 10% chance to cause an Arcane burst when returning to the player.
